texto: Some salesmen think that selling is like eating—to satisfy an existing appetite
autor: but a good salesman is like a good cook—he can create an appetite when the buyer isn't hungry.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a but a good salesman is like a good cook—he can create an appetite when the buyer isn't hungry.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Some salesmen think that selling is like eating—to satisfy an existing appetite” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, george-horace-lorimer, salesmen pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
